# comfyui_output_artifact (Resource)

Downloads a remote ComfyUI file via /view and manages the local artifact on disk.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `filename` (String) Remote ComfyUI filename to download.
- `path` (String) Local destination path for the downloaded artifact.

### Optional

- `subfolder` (String) Optional remote subfolder for the file.
- `type` (String) Remote ComfyUI storage type for the file: input, output, or temp.

### Read-Only

- `content_length` (Number) Downloaded file size in bytes.
- `id` (String) Absolute local path of the managed artifact.
- `sha256` (String) SHA-256 hash of the downloaded local file.
- `url` (String) ComfyUI /view URL for the remote file.
